gui.dmzkiaddon.learn_from_master: Train with a Master to learn techniques
skill.dragonminez.addon_ki_laser.desc: Fires a high-speed Ki laser beam. Low cost, ideal for fast combat.
skill.dragonminez.addon_dodompa.desc: A piercing pink Ki beam. Master Roshi's signature technique.
skill.dragonminez.addon_ki_volley.desc: Unleashes a rapid barrage of Ki blasts. Great for pressuring enemies.
skill.dragonminez.addon_masenko.desc: Gohan's Ki wave. Fast and piercing, fired with both hands raised overhead.
skill.dragonminez.addon_galick_gun.desc: Vegeta's signature purple Ki wave. A powerful discharge that devastates everything in its path.
skill.dragonminez.addon_kamehameha.desc: The iconic technique of the Son lineage. A devastating blue Ki wave focused through the palms.
skill.dragonminez.addon_ki_disc.desc: A razor-sharp Ki disc that cuts through enemies. Krillin's technique. Fires instantly.
skill.dragonminez.addon_makankosappo.des: Piccolo's spiraling drill beam. Pierces any defense with its rotating force.
skill.dragonminez.addon_taiyoken.desc: Emits a blinding flash that paralyzes nearby enemies. Tenshinhan's technique.
skill.dragonminez.addon_big_bang.desc: A massive white Ki sphere launched with one hand. Vegeta SSJ's defining technique.
skill.dragonminez.addon_spirit_bomb.desc: Absorbs the life energy of all living beings. Power grows with charge. Goku's sacred technique.
skill.dragonminez.addon_death_ball.desc: Frieza's crimson Ki sphere. Capable of destroying entire planets with enough charge.
skill.dragonminez.addon_hellzone.desc: Creates orbiting Ki spheres that surround the enemy and converge simultaneously. No escape.
skill.dragonminez.addon_final_flash.desc: Vegeta's most powerful charged attack. A golden wave of pure energy that obliterates everything.
skill.dragonminez.addon_final_kamehameha: Gogeta's ultimate technique. Merges the blue Kamehameha and golden Final Flash into one devastating beam.
skill.dragonminez.addon_hakai.desc: The absolute destruction power of a God. Obliterates the very existence of the target. Beerus's technique.
command.dmzkiaddon.locate.not_found: §c[DMZKiAddon] %s has not spawned yet in this world.
msg.dmzkiaddon.taiyoken_no_skill: You haven't learned Solar Flare yet.
log.dmzkiaddon.spawn.overworld_search_st: [DMZKiAddon] Overworld spawn chunk loaded. Starting plains search...
log.dmzkiaddon.spawn.vegeta_no_plains: [DMZKiAddon] Vegeta: no plains biome found near spawn.
log.dmzkiaddon.spawn.namek_search_start: [DMZKiAddon] Namek spawn chunk loaded. Searching for Frieza position...
